ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Continued To May-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christina Sanchez (pro per) appeared via zoom (petitioner).

Ms. Sanchez requests a short continuance to file her papers. Matter is continued to May 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by May 14, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Christina Sanchez, in court, in propria persona, Administrator.

At the outset, Ms. Sanchez takes full responsibility for not appearing at the previous calling and provides an update as to the Inventory and Appraisal. The court reminds Ms. Sanchez what she needs to file.

After additional discussion, the Status of Filing Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Mar-26-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-23-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Christina H. Sanchez (petitioner) to appear on February 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why she should not be suspended as administrator for failure to appear and failure to file Inventory and Appraisal. Status on filing and Inventory and Appraisal is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.
